problem id: 0df8306a
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(3) XOR SHR(6)) AND ROT(3)

examples:
  10111010 -> 11010000
  00001001 -> 01001000
  00000111 -> 00111000
  00111011 -> 11011000
  01111001 -> 11001001
  10001000 -> 01000000
  10101001 -> 01001000
  10001110 -> 01110000

query: 10010000
predicted answer: 10000000
